underlying_goal: Replace ugly search dropdowns and tables across all modules with a better-looking component library
friction_detail: TypeScript type errors in DataTable component needed fixing, and system resource issues (spawn EBADF) occurred during development server startup.
brief_summary: User wanted to replace all module tables/search dropdowns with shadcn-vue + TanStack Table; completed infrastructure setup and multiple module replacements, though some system-level issues occurred.
